notes: Second trinket depends on the fight: Black Blood of Y'Shaarj for active play, Kardris' Toxic Totem for passive value, Frenzied Crystal of Rage on AoE fights. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
